conditionalAlwaysOnSkills.note: Repo has AGENTS.md or .github/agent/memory/ — load PDCA memory loop before coding.

descriptionOverrides.using-superpowers: Cursor 技能路由：匹配 description；0→1/vibe coding 须 Read zero-to-one-gate + brainstorming。见 refinements/using-superpowers.md。
descriptionOverrides.pm-prd-writer: 把模糊需求转化为可评审的产品需求文档（PRD）。当用户说写PRD、需求文档、功能说明书时使用。不适用于：纯技术方案与模块架构（用 zero-to-one-gate）、纯 UI 标注（用 design-handoff）。
descriptionOverrides.requirement-clarifier: ALWAYS apply at session start and before execution. Converts fuzzy vibe-coding input into Mini-Spec (S4.5) + structured S1-S12 + Agent execution Prompt. Read vibe-coding-bridge.md for B-class coding. Use for 帮我做/优化一下/vibe coding/agent实现 before Write/Edit.
descriptionOverrides.design-taste-frontend: Anti-slop 前端审美（Leonxlnx/taste-skill v2）。Landing/作品集/改版；先读 brief 再定设计方向。用户说 UI 丑、要设计感、落地页、portfolio、anti-slop 时使用。
descriptionOverrides.gpt-taste: Codex/GPT 向 stricter taste-skill：更高 layout variance + GSAP ScrollTrigger。高动效 landing 时用。
descriptionOverrides.redesign-existing-projects: Use when auditing or improving an existing site's UI (spacing, hierarchy, typography). Not for greenfield landing pages (use design-taste-frontend).
descriptionOverrides.figma2code: Use when implementing HTML/CSS/JS from a Figma URL, file key, node id, or mockup — frame extraction, interactions, and project integration. Triggers: 按 Figma 实现, Figma 转代码, 设计稿转代码, 对照 Figma.
descriptionOverrides.figma-workflow: Use when Agent Platform Figma work needs figma.config.json — implement from Figma, sync HTML to Figma, or create design files. Triggers: 按 Figma 实现, 同步到 Figma, 对照设计稿.
descriptionOverrides.ouro-loop: Use when a task needs MAP-PLAN-BUILD-VERIFY-REMEDIATE autonomous loops with multiple verification gates.
descriptionOverrides.deep-research: Use when the user needs multi-source research with citations, fact-check, or 深度研究/文献回顾 before conclusions — not for quick one-line answers.
descriptionOverrides.brainstorming: Use when creating features, modifying behavior, or any creative implementation work before writing code or scaffolds.
descriptionOverrides.systematic-debugging: Use when encountering bugs, test failures, unexpected behavior, or performance issues — before proposing fixes.
descriptionOverrides.ai-coding-ok: Use FIRST on coding tasks when the repo has AGENTS.md or .github/agent/memory/. Triggers: 新功能, 修复, 重构, implement, fix, refactor.
descriptionOverrides.zero-to-one-gate: Use when work is greenfield, a new module/page/workflow, or 帮我做… without ADR coverage — before Write/Edit on implementation files.
descriptionOverrides.writing-plans: Use when there is an approved spec or requirements for a multi-step task, before touching code.
descriptionOverrides.ai-delivery-gate: Use before claiming prototype delivery done in Agent Platform — after editing prototype/assets/*.js or when user asks for sign-off.
descriptionOverrides.global-delivery-gate: Use before claiming done/fixed/PASS on any repo — run detected verify commands with fresh evidence.
descriptionOverrides.diagnose: Use when the user says diagnose this, debug this, or reports a bug/performance regression needing structured reproduction.
descriptionOverrides.writing-skills: Use when creating, editing, or verifying Agent Skills (SKILL.md) before deployment.
descriptionOverrides.skill-stocktake: Use when auditing skills inventory for Keep/Improve/Retire/Merge verdicts.
descriptionOverrides.agent-sort: Use when trimming ECC/skills to DAILY vs LIBRARY buckets for a specific repo.
descriptionOverrides.planning-with-files-zh: Use when the user asks in Chinese for multi-step planning with task_plan.md, findings.md, progress.md, or 规划/拆解/进度跟踪.
descriptionOverrides.verification-before-completion: Use before claiming done, fixed, or PASS — re-read acceptance criteria and run fresh verify output.
descriptionOverrides.agent-verifier: Use before PR or when user asks to verify/audit agent-generated code for security, patterns, and quality.
descriptionOverrides.memory-handoff: Use when user says resume, handoff, where were we, or picks up a session without fresh context.
descriptionOverrides.image-to-code: Use when implementing a website from reference images or screenshots with section-by-section visual fidelity.
descriptionOverrides.tdd-workflow: Use when implementing features or bugfixes with test-driven development across unit, integration, and E2E layers.
descriptionOverrides.pm-image2proto: Use when converting a screenshot or reference image into an HTML prototype with iterative refinement.
